mapper.sql: id, job_name AS jobName, job_group AS jobGroup, invoke_target AS invokeTarget, job_params AS jobParams, cron_expression AS cronExpression, misfire_policy AS misfirePolicy, concurrent, status, remark, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_job WHERE id = #{jobId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, job_id AS jobId, job_name AS jobName, invoke_target AS invokeTarget, job_params AS jobParams, status, message, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, cost_ms AS costMs FROM sys_job_log WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY start_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
